Image generated using AI5. Llama 4
Meta’s Llama series has arguably done more than any other model family to accelerate the open source AI movement. Although newer competitors have overtaken it on several benchmarks, Llama 4 remains one of the most widely adopted models because of its mature ecosystem, extensive fine tuning community, and excellent tooling support.
What makes Llama 4 special is not just raw intelligence but its versatility. Thousands of developers have built applications, fine tuned checkpoints, and AI agents around it, making deployment significantly easier than many newer models.
Performance Snapshot
Parameters: Multiple variants including Scout and Maverick
Context Window: Up to 10 million tokens
Official Highlights
GPQA Diamond: 73.7%
LiveCodeBench: 33.3%
SWE Bench Verified: 68.0%
Strong multilingual reasoning
Excellent long context understanding
Minimum Hardware
RTX 4090 for quantized versions
Multiple H100 or RTX Pro GPUs for flagship deployments
